Saturday - May 23, 2026
UNIVERSITY CENTER, UCSB
Gaucho Gaming's 2026 GG Con features tournaments, voice actors, Vtubers, freeplay, and clubs!
Register Now View Talents

What is GG Con?

GG Con 2026 is an all day convention of gaming and community hosted by Gaucho Gaming, happening Saturday, May 23rd, 2026.

Join us for tournaments, voice actor panels, VTubers, workshops, art alley, and collaborations with student clubs across campus. Whether you’re here to compete, learn, create, or just hang out, GG Con has something for everyone.

Proudly Sponsored By

Registration

RSVP to Gaucho Gaming Con 2026, sponsored by Seasonic! A ticket is mandatory in order to participate in any convention events, including any of our FOUR talent panels!

Check-in at Corwin Pavilion, where you can show your ticket for entry.

Register Now
